# Meza General Contractors

> Family-owned Houston roofing and storm-damage restoration company, serving the Houston area since 1958 (second generation). Documentation-first approach: helps homeowners document storm damage before contacting their insurer. Bilingual service (English & Spanish).

## Business facts
- Founded: 1958 (68 years of experience)
- Location: Houston, TX — serves a 100-mile radius
- Phone: (346) 281-4358
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8 AM – 7 PM
- Languages: English and Spanish

## Services
- Residential and commercial roofing (TPO, metal, modified bitumen)
- Storm damage documentation and full roof replacement
- Free initial evaluation (same-day or next-day)
- Seamless gutters; interior and exterior painting; home remodeling
- For denied insurance claims: referral to independent attorneys (not legal advice; not a public adjuster)

- Home: https://mezageneralcontractors.com/
- Storm Damage / Insurance Claims: https://mezageneralcontractors.com/insurance-claims.html
- Commercial Roofing: https://mezageneralcontractors.com/commercial.html
- About: https://mezageneralcontractors.com/about.html
- Contact / Free Initial Evaluation: https://mezageneralcontractors.com/contact.html
